# Opsell AI

> Opsell AI is an AI-led commerce growth and execution platform that helps consumer brands become agent-ready for the era of agentic commerce. Opsell continuously optimizes and executes product listings, catalog attributes, pricing, promotions, bundles, and catalog hygiene across marketplaces and commerce channels, helping brands increase visibility, improve conversion, grow revenue, and protect margins.

As AI shopping agents increasingly research, compare, recommend, and purchase products on behalf of consumers, brands need structured, accurate, and continuously optimized product data. Opsell ensures that product catalogs are understandable not only to human shoppers but also to AI-powered buying agents.

Built by OPPSELL TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED, India. Product name: Opsell AI.

## Mission

Opsell helps consumer brands win in both traditional e-commerce and emerging agent-driven commerce by making every product listing discoverable, trustworthy, and conversion-ready.

## What Opsell Does

### Listing & Content Manager

Transforms product catalogs into agent-ready assets by enriching product titles, descriptions, specifications, and attributes with structured, intent-rich data. This improves discoverability, recommendation likelihood, and conversion rates.

### AI Pricing Engine

Monitors pricing performance and market dynamics to recommend or execute pricing changes within brand-defined margin guardrails, helping maximize revenue while protecting profitability.

### Discount & Bundle Optimizer

Identifies the most effective discounting and bundling opportunities to improve sell-through, increase average order value, and accelerate inventory movement.

### Competitor Intelligence

Tracks competitor pricing, assortment changes, and marketplace activity, enabling brands to respond faster and protect both market share and margins.

### Catalog Health Monitoring

Continuously audits product catalogs to identify missing attributes, content inconsistencies, pricing gaps, and listing quality issues that can reduce discoverability.

## Supported Commerce Channels

Opsell supports modern omnichannel commerce operations, including:

* Amazon
* Flipkart
* Myntra
* Meesho
* Shopify
* Quick Commerce Platforms

Current integrations include Amazon, Shopify, Meesho, and Flipkart. Additional marketplace and quick-commerce integrations continue to expand.

## Agentic Commerce

Agentic commerce is the evolution of online shopping where autonomous AI agents research, compare, recommend, and purchase products on behalf of consumers.

Instead of browsing manually, shoppers increasingly rely on AI systems to identify the best product based on intent, specifications, price, availability, delivery speed, and overall value.

In this environment, the products most likely to be recommended are those with:

* Complete and structured attributes
* Consistent catalog information
* Competitive pricing
* Accurate availability data
* High-quality product content

Opsell serves as the optimization and execution layer that helps brands meet these requirements at scale, increasing the probability of recommendation by both AI agents and human shoppers.

## Benefits for Brands

* Improve product discoverability
* Increase conversion rates
* Recover lost revenue opportunities
* Protect and improve margins
* Maintain catalog consistency across channels
* Improve recommendation likelihood in AI-powered shopping experiences
* Reduce manual catalog management effort
* Respond faster to competitor actions

## Key Facts

* Most brands connect their catalog and receive actionable recommendations within 15 minutes.
* Revenue improvements are typically observed within 2–4 weeks.
* Brands maintain full operational control through configurable workflows:

  * Fully automated execution
  * Approval-first execution
  * Recommendation-only mode
* Opsell is designed for digital-first consumer brands operating across multiple marketplaces and commerce channels.
